title: Netanyahu says building 'new alliances with important countries' in West Asia amid Iran war
summary_full: In an address in Hebrew ahead of Pesach, Netanyahu said the Iranian regime would collapse “sooner or later” and that Israel is building “new alliances with important countries in the region” to counter Tehran. He did not name the countries but said he hopes that “soon, I will be able to tell you more about these vital alliances”.
